questions.question: Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
Find the next number in the series: 5, 14, 23, 32, 41, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 9. So, 41 + (9) = 50.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: Who wrote the national anthem of India?
What is the average of the following 5 consecutive even numbers: 41, 43, 45, 47, 49?
questions.trick: For a consecutive arithmetic sequence, the average is simply the exact middle term.

questions.question: A can complete a piece of work in 56 days while B can complete the same work in 76 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 56 * 76 = 4256. Rate = 56 + 76 = 132. Time = Work / Rate = 32.24 days.

questions.question: Who was the first President of India?
If an article is bought for Rs. 1200 and sold at a profit of 15%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.

questions.question:
Statements:
1. All Pens are Pencils.
2. All Pencils are Stationery.

Which conclusion logically follows?
questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, and B is a subset of C, then A must be a subset of C completely.
questions.trick: Draw a venn diagram: Small circle A inside Medium B inside Large C.

questions.question: If DOG is coded as EPH, how will CUP be coded in that same language?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by exactly 1 positions in the English alphabet.
questions.trick: Note the position gap between the first letter of the word and the first letter of its code.

questions.question: A train travels at an average speed of 113 km/hr. How much distance will it cover in 4 hours?
questions.trick: Basic multiplication rule: D = S * T.

questions.question: Which is the longest river in the world?
Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 36, 49, 122, 64
questions.explanation: 36, 49, and 64 are perfect squares. 122 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.
